title: What is BM25?
content: BM25 is a ranking function used by search engines to estimate the relevance of documents to a given query, based on term frequency and document length normalization.

title: Vector Embeddings for Semantic Search
content: Vector embeddings represent text as points in a high-dimensional space, allowing similarity search based on meaning rather than exact keyword matches.

title: Consistent Hashing for Sharding
content: Consistent hashing is a technique used to distribute data across shards in a way that minimizes reshuffling when nodes are added or removed.

title: Concurrency Patterns in Go
content: Go's goroutines and channels make it straightforward to express concurrent fan-out and fan-in patterns, which are core to distributed query coordination.

title: Fault Tolerance in Distributed Systems
content: Fault-tolerant systems continue operating correctly even when some components fail, often by using timeouts, retries, replication, and health checks.
